summary: BLOCKs 550, 553, 555, 556 frontend testing completed successfully. All mobile-friendly tooltips work correctly (tap-to-open, tap-outside-to-close, z-index 999). Value This button removed from record cards, Set Value button removed from wishlist cards - both replaced with Pending badges. Recover Values button has correct tooltip text and secondary glassy styling.
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 550 ✅ - Refresh button (data-testid='treasury-refresh-btn') has tooltip 'Quick Sync: Refresh current market prices.' on hover

BLOCK 550 ✅ - Recover Values button (data-testid='start-recovery-btn') has tooltip with 'Deep Search: Use the Recovery Engine to find prices for all unvalued or $0 records in your collection at once.'
BLOCK 553 ✅ - MobileTooltip component (lines 68-116) implements tap-to-open, tap-outside-to-close pattern
BLOCK 553 ✅ - MobileTooltip has z-[999] class (verified via Playwright - z-index: 999)
BLOCK 553 ✅ - X close button rendered on mobile via sm:hidden class (visible on <640px screens)
BLOCK 553 ✅ - data-testid='refresh-tooltip' and 'recover-tooltip' present on tooltip containers
BLOCK 555 ✅ - No elements with data-testid matching 'value-this-btn-*' found (Value This button REMOVED)
BLOCK 555 ✅ - Unvalued records show 'Pending' badge with data-testid='record-value-pending-{id}' (line 1290)
BLOCK 555 ✅ - Pending badge tooltip explains to use Recover Values: 'Valuation Pending — use Recover Values in the header to find prices for all unvalued records.'
BLOCK 555 ✅ - WishlistCard 'Set Value' button REMOVED - replaced with 'Pending' badge (data-testid='wishlist-value-pending-{id}') at line 1434
BLOCK 556 ✅ - Recover Values tooltip explicitly states 'for all unvalued or $0 records in your collection at once'
BLOCK 556 ✅ - Recover Values button has secondary glassy style (lines 257-261): background rgba(218,165,32,0.3) gradient, NOT solid gold like primary buttons
Frontend ✅ - ESLint passes with no errors on CollectionPage.js
seed_data_creation: Added test record to test_recovery@test.com collection for testing TreasuryHeader visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKs 550, 553, 555, 556 verified. MobileTooltip component at lines 68-116 of CollectionPage.js handles both desktop (hover) and mobile (tap) patterns. TreasuryHeader only shows when user has records with total_count > 0 or collection value data. Recover Values button only appears when totalCount > valuedCount (unvalued records exist). Pending badges replace the former Value This and Set Value buttons.

block_550_refresh_tooltip.description: Refresh button shows 'Quick Sync: Refresh current market prices.' tooltip on hover
block_550_refresh_tooltip.test_method: Playwright hover on data-testid='treasury-refresh-btn', verified tooltip text

block_550_recover_tooltip.description: Recover Values button shows Deep Search tooltip with full description
block_550_recover_tooltip.test_method: Playwright hover on data-testid='start-recovery-btn', verified tooltip contains 'Deep Search', 'Recovery Engine', 'all unvalued or $0 records', 'collection at once'

block_553_mobile_tooltip_tap.description: MobileTooltip opens on tap (click) for touch devices
block_553_mobile_tooltip_tap.test_method: Mobile viewport (390x844), clicked on buttons, tooltip appeared

block_553_mobile_tooltip_close.test_method: Clicked body after tooltip open, tooltip disappeared

block_555_value_this_removed.description: No 'Value This' buttons exist on record cards

block_555_record_pending_badge.description: Unvalued records show 'Pending' badge with data-testid

block_556_recover_tooltip_content.description: Recover Values tooltip mentions 'all unvalued or $0 records in your collection at once'
block_556_recover_tooltip_content.test_method: Verified tooltip text contains exact phrase

block_556_recover_button_styling.description: Recover Values button has secondary glassy style, not primary gold
block_556_recover_button_styling.test_method: Code review: background uses rgba gradient (0.3 opacity), not solid #FFD700

frontend_compiles.test_method: ESLint on CollectionPage.js returned no issues
